recommendations.title: Both Sides of the Blade
recommendations.overview: Jean and Sara have been living together for 10 years. When they first met, Sara was living with François, Jean’s best friend and an admirer from back when he played rugby. Jean and Sara love each other. One day, Sara sees François in the street. He d

recommendations.title: Haute Cuisine
recommendations.overview: The story of Danièle Delpeuch and how she was appointed as the private chef for François Mitterrand.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: American Pie: Revealed
recommendations.overview: Documentary about the making of American Pie (1999), American Pie 2 (2001) and American Wedding (2003).

recommendations.title: The First Time
recommendations.overview: A spark of attraction smolders, then ignites, between two teens from different high schools who meet by chance at a party.

recommendations.title: Beached Tuna
recommendations.overview: Francesco,  a young man who wants to be a comedian, insults his girlfriend to make his public laugh; she will break up with and so he will think of a crazy plan to win her back.

recommendations.title: Monday
recommendations.overview: A spark on a Friday can lead to a sizzling weekend fling, but what happens when you get to the inevitable Monday?

recommendations.title: Anthony Zimmer
recommendations.overview: François, an ordinary Joe, falls hard for the sublimely beautiful woman who has just picked him up on the train and invited him to spend the weekend with her on the Riviera. But when the lady disappears the next morning and the police drag him in for

recommendations.title: Jungle Beat: The Movie
recommendations.overview: The Jungle Beat animals think it’s the best thing ever when an alien arrives in the jungle bringing with him the power of speech. They also surprisingly think it’s the best thing ever when they find out that he’s been sent to conquer them.

recommendations.title: The Last Summer
recommendations.overview: Standing on the precipice of adulthood, a group of friends navigate new relationships, while reexamining others, during their final summer before college.
